publications.title: Recurrent Quantum Feature Maps for Reservoir Computing
publications.abstract: Introduces a quantum reservoir computing framework for time-series forecasting using hardware-aware feature maps.

publications.title: A Resource-Efficient Quantum Kernel
publications.abstract: Proposes a quantum kernel method that reduces qubit and gate requirements while maintaining classification performance on near-term hardware.
publications.award: Deep Tech Canada NRC Student Award 2024

publications.title: Coherent Feed-Forward Quantum Neural Network
publications.abstract: Introduces a novel coherent feed-forward quantum neural network architecture for classification tasks.

publications.title: Seeking Metal-Organic Frameworks for Hydrogen Storage Using Classical and Quantum Active Learning
publications.abstract: Applies classical and quantum active learning to accelerate the discovery of metal-organic frameworks suitable for hydrogen storage.

publications.title: Local and Multi-Scale Strategies to Mitigate Exponential Concentration in Quantum Kernels
publications.abstract: Studies local and multi-scale strategies to address the exponential concentration problem in quantum kernel methods.
